array.string:
HB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Augusta/heartbeat" PID_FILE="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Augusta/augusta.pid" STALE_THRESHOLD=120
[ ! -f "$HB" ] && exit 0 [ ! -f "$PID_FILE" ] && exit 0
HB_TS=$(cat "$HB" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]') [ -z "$HB_TS" ] && exit 0
NOW=$(date +%s) AGE=$((NOW - HB_TS))
if [ "$AGE" -gt "$STALE_THRESHOLD" ]; then PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]') if [ -n "$PID" ] && kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then logger -t augusta.watchdog "Heartbeat stale (${AGE}s) — sending SIGTERM to PID $PID" kill -TERM "$PID" fi fi
